ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region to which the department belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department record */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the department in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population data is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the population data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored externally) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region record */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year's data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year */,
  "average_population_growth" REAL /* Average population growth rate for the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the yearly data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the yearly data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the yearly data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanization" (
  "urbanization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urbanization data entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the urbanization data is recorded */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population count for the given year */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population count for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the urbanization data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the urbanization data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the urbanization data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urbanization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urbanization_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic indicator entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic indicators are recorded */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate for the given year */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate for the given year */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic indicators were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic indicators */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic indicators (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_indicators_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data entry */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was inspected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data after inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who reviewed the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the quality control entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the inspector about the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
